strong.function: Excretion, cooling, water regulation, downward and inward energy conservation

weak.function: Digestion, intake, nutrient processing, upward and outward energy movement

organ_balance.note: In SCM, organs refer to functional systems, not strict anatomical organs. Kidney = excretory/cooling function. Spleen = digestive/intake function.

body_characteristics.build: Tends toward a slender, smaller frame. Well-developed hip area relative to chest. Delicate features.
body_characteristics.head_neck: Softer features, gentle expression. May have a smaller frame overall.
body_characteristics.metabolism: Slow and cold. Difficulty generating warmth and digestive fire. Tends toward poor appetite and slow digestion.
vulnerabilities: Susceptibility to cold and damp conditions

personality.seong_innate: Introspective, gentle, meticulous, home-oriented. High attention to detail and strong organizational abilities.
personality.jeong_emotion: Higher harm-avoidance scores (scientifically validated). Cautious, can become anxious or insecure. Tendency toward worry and overthinking.

warning_signs: Loss of appetite lasting more than a few days
protective_factors: Regular small meals rather than large ones
Avoiding cold environments and cold foods

harmful_foods: Cold raw foods (sashimi, raw salads in excess)
Watermelon and cold-natured fruits in excess
diet.ginseng_reason: Ginseng is a warming herb that strengthens digestive function (Spleen Qi) — exactly what So-Eum types lack. It provides warmth, energy, and improves appetite and nutrient absorption. This is the type that benefits most from ginseng.
diet.thermal_principle: Prioritize warm and hot-natured foods. Cook rather than eat raw. Ginger, cinnamon, and warming spices are medicine.

skincare.skin_tendency: Tends toward dry, thin, pale skin. Poor circulation leads to dull complexion. Sensitive to cold weather. May be prone to dryness-related conditions.
avoid_ingredients: Strong astringents that dry the skin
Menthol or camphor in high concentrations
skincare.routine_principle: Focus on warming, nourishing, and circulation-boosting. Rich creams and oils over lightweight gels. Protect skin barrier aggressively.

beneficial.name: Insam (인삼)
beneficial.action: Warms Spleen, strengthens digestion, boosts Qi — the most important herb for So-Eum

beneficial.name: Hwanggi (황기)
beneficial.action: Strengthens defensive Qi, supports digestion, boosts energy

beneficial.name: Baekchul (백출)
beneficial.action: Strengthens Spleen, dries dampness, improves appetite

beneficial.name: Bujauh (부자)
beneficial.action: Powerfully warming; rescues Yang collapse, warms interior cold

beneficial.name: Gangang (건강)
beneficial.action: Warms the middle, dispels cold, restores digestive fire

avoid.name: Mahwang (마황)
avoid.reason: Dispersing herb that depletes already weak Qi in So-Eum

avoid.name: Taeksa (택사)
avoid.reason: Draining and cooling; depletes fluids and warmth that So-Eum needs to conserve

avoid.name: Hwangryeon (황련)
avoid.reason: Extremely bitter and cold; suppresses digestive fire

herbs.classic_formula: Gwankeibujauh-rhee-jung-tang (관계부자이중탕) — warms the interior and strengthens Spleen function

research_notes.genetic: GWAS studies have identified genetic loci associated with So-Eum type. Higher prevalence of certain HLA alleles compared to other types.
research_notes.behavioral: Studies on children show So-Eum types score significantly higher on harm-avoidance scales in temperament assessments, validating the traditional personality descriptions.
research_notes.heritability: SCM type heritability estimated at 41–55% based on twin studies (2019).
